THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELLENBERGER, MARIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 179 TEDDY AVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94134, LEASE FORFEITED, PLT WILL WAIVE BACK RENTS, IF DEFT MOVED OUT BY 10-1-94. IF DEFT DEFAULTS, PLT WILL HAVE BACK RENT OF $231 PLUS DAMAGES AT $35.66/DAY FROM 7-21-94 TO DATE OF POSSESSION, PLUS COSTS OF $143.80
